subcodes.first_line: Immeasurable harm hath befallen Us through that which the hands of the oppressors have wrought, yet boundless joy resideth therein, inasmuch as the gaze [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ضر بی منتهی وارد بما اکتسبت ایدی الظالمین سرور لایحصی موجود لان النظر الی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
